def: FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES financial_bank_accounts(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
NOT NULL amount
FOREIGN KEY (approved_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (category_id_int) REFERENCES financial_categories(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (cost_center_id_int) REFERENCES financial_cost_centers(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
NOT NULL created_at
NOT NULL description
NOT NULL due_date
NOT NULL id
FOREIGN KEY (party_id_int) REFERENCES financial_parties(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
PRIMARY KEY (id)
FOREIGN KEY (recurrence_id) REFERENCES financial_recurrences(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (store_id_int) REFERENCES stores(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
NOT NULL store_id_int
FOREIGN KEY (to_account_id) REFERENCES financial_bank_accounts(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
NOT NULL type
NOT NULL updated_at
FOREIGN KEY (updated_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (approved_by) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
FOREIGN KEY (recurrence_id) REFERENCES financial_recurrences(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
